name: PrathamAi - A Unified Business Agent
description: PrathamAi is a sophisticated multi-domain AI agent for customer service, data analytics, and finance/accounting. It handles support tickets, data analysis, expense tracking, scheduling, and document processing with intelligent workflow orchestration. Built by Team Sleepyhead for Nasiko Hackathon 2026.

skills.name: Customer Service
skills.description: Comprehensive customer service management including support ticket creation, tracking, sentiment analysis, and automated FAQ responses. Manages the entire customer support lifecycle with intelligent categorization and priority assignment.
examples: Create a support ticket for john.doe@example.com about login issues with high priority
What's the status of ticket TKT-20260328-001?
Show me all open high-priority tickets
Analyze the sentiment of this customer message: I'm very frustrated with the slow response
Close ticket TKT-001 with resolution: Password reset completed
Find similar tickets about login problems

skills.name: Data Analytics
skills.description: Advanced data processing and analysis capabilities for CSV, Excel, and JSON files. Performs statistical analysis, pattern detection, trend identification, and generates comprehensive reports with actionable insights.
examples: Analyze this sales CSV file and show me the top 3 trends
Load the quarterly revenue data from /data/q1_2026.xlsx
Generate a detailed report from dataset DS-20260328-001
What patterns do you see in the customer purchase behavior data?
Create a summary of Q1 revenue broken down by product category
Find correlations between marketing spend and sales revenue

skills.name: Finance & Accounting
skills.description: Complete financial management system with expense tracking, invoice processing using OCR, receipt digitization, budget monitoring, and financial reporting. Automatically categorizes expenses and generates compliance-ready reports.
examples: Process this invoice image at /uploads/invoice_acme.pdf and create an expense record
Add an expense of $125.50 for office supplies from Staples purchased on March 28th
Show me all expenses from last month in the travel category
What's my current spend against the Q1 marketing budget?
Generate a financial summary report for the first quarter of 2026
Process these 5 receipt images and categorize them automatically

skills.name: Scheduling & Calendar Management
skills.description: Intelligent calendar and meeting management with Google Calendar integration. Schedules meetings, finds optimal time slots, sends invitations via email, and handles timezone conversions automatically.
examples: Schedule a 30-minute meeting with client@example.com next Tuesday at 2 PM EST
Find available time slots for a 1-hour meeting this week
What meetings do I have scheduled for tomorrow?
Cancel the meeting with event ID EVT-20260328-001
Reschedule my 3 PM meeting to 4 PM and notify all attendees
Find a time when both john@example.com and jane@example.com are available

skills.name: Document Processing & OCR
skills.description: Advanced document processing with OCR capabilities for invoices, receipts, forms, and reports. Extracts structured data from PDFs and images, validates information, and integrates with other business workflows.
examples: Extract all text from this invoice PDF
Process this receipt image and tell me the vendor, amount, and date
Validate this document as a properly formatted invoice
Batch process these 10 receipt images from /uploads/receipts/
Extract line items from this multi-page invoice PDF
What information can you extract from this business card image?

skills.name: Multi-Domain Workflows
skills.description: Execute complex workflows spanning multiple business domains. Intelligently orchestrates tasks across customer service, analytics, finance, and scheduling to handle sophisticated business processes end-to-end.
examples: I have an invoice from Acme Corp for $1,250. Process it, create an expense record, and schedule a meeting next week to discuss
Analyze our Q1 sales data, create a report, and email it to the leadership team
Create a support ticket for this customer complaint, analyze the sentiment, and if negative, schedule a follow-up call
Process these expense receipts, categorize them, check if they're within budget, and generate a summary report
Load the customer feedback dataset, analyze sentiment trends, and create tickets for any negative feedback
Schedule interviews with all shortlisted candidates and send them calendar invitations
